description: Part C regression pin — scoped read (.eq('slug', slug) URL-param) followed by unscoped write (.insert() on audit_log). Write-after-scoped-read pattern: the initial read is tenant-boundary safe, but the subsequent insert may place data in the wrong tenant. Must still emit after Part C: presence of ANY .insert/.update/.delete in the handler defeats suppression (rule 5 in handover Step 5c).
